$comment: D-OPT-MEM2REG-CONDITIONAL-INIT-UNDEF witness — a conditionally-initialized live local (`int x; if(c) x=1; return x+c;`). The release pipeline's Mem2Reg previously ABORTED on the phi's missing else-incoming (valid C — gcc/SQLite do this); it now materializes undef-as-zero (an entry-block Const 0). Debug runs no Mem2Reg (always worked); the `release` arm is the witness. exit 2 = 1+1 via a mutable global (anti-fold); g_c=1 so the then-branch defines x (the undef else edge is never dynamically taken — reading it is UB, so the pinned property is compile-does-not-abort + defined-path-correct).
